messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for infliximab for member NH-644362 with moderate-to-severe Crohn's disease. Attached: gastroenterologist order, documentation of failed conventional therapy (mesalamine and azathioprine over nine months), negative TB screening.
